aka: You Shall Not Make an Image

director.name: 考塞尔·本·哈尼耶 Kaouther Ben Hania

trans_title: You Shall Not Make an Image
introduction: The story revolves around a young, reserved woman called Amira who’s studying in Tunis, who’s passionate about film, and who’s given a mysterious key by her dying grandmother. She launches herself into an exploration of her family’s past and the beliefs of her village, without suspecting the increasingly unbelievable revelations this will entail, which call into question everything she holds to be true…
